checks.vd_limit_source: KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 12 §G power circuits

KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 12 §G power circuits

non_compliance_flags.message: Cumulative-Vd binding on sub-feeder to DB-P1 — 35 m run forces csa walk-up from 16 mm² (Iz pass but cumulative 1.81% pushes downstream F02.C03 to 5.01%, over the 5% limit) to 25 mm² to preserve downstream headroom for the 45 m remote final circuit (F02.C03). Post-H4 (Sprint B): 3-phase denominator corrected to 415 V line-line per BS 7671 App 12.

Cumulative-Vd binding on remote small-power final per KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 12 §G power circuits. 2.5 mm² rejected at 5.27% cumulative (> 5% limit); 4 mm² accepted at 4.47% cumulative. Post-H4 (Sprint B): denominators corrected to 415 V line-line for 3-phase parent F02; F02.C03 itself is single-phase so /230 retained. Engineer-confirmed acceptable; runtime calc.voltage_drop deferred per WI3.

Motor-starting voltage drop on 7.5 kW DOL chiller pump (3-phase) = 3.0% (Vd_running 0.46% × LRA factor 6.5 for IEC AB design code; post-H4 corrected to 415 V line-line per BS 7671 App 12). Within the 10% starting limit per KS 1700:2018 §552 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 552.1.1 + IEC 60034-12. Engineer accepts; future calc.motor_starting_vd to ratify.

assumptions: KPLC TN-S 415V TPN+E supply per KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §313.1; engineer-declared Ze=0.45Ω and PSCC=9.0 kA at MSB-1 busbar verified at incoming.

Cumulative voltage drop budget allocated across the cascade per KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 12 §G: sub-feeder F02 walked up to 25 mm² to preserve 3.2% segment headroom for the remote final circuit F02.C03 (45 m).

Motor starting Vd estimate uses LRA factor 6.5 for IEC AB design code per KS 1700:2018 §552 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 552.1.1 + IEC 60034-12; vd_starting = vd_running × LRA = 0.46% × 6.5 = 3.0% (within 10% limit; post-H4 corrected for 3-phase ÷415).

CPC sized per KS 1700:2018 §543 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 543.1.3 + Table 54.7; phase ≤ 16 mm² → CPC = phase by Table 54.7 conservative default; reduced CPC for ≥ 25 mm² phase verified by adiabatic equation S² ≥ I²t / k².
Engineer's design intent: XLPE for feeders (MSB-1, F01, F02, F03) for thermal margin and future load growth; PVC for final circuits (F02.C03, F03.C01) per typical Kenyan commercial fit-out practice.
Parent-node Ifault attenuation along cascade modelled as engineer estimates (MSB-1 9.0 kA → F02.C03 7.5 kA / F03.C01 8.2 kA); calc.fault_level deferred per WI3.

calc.cable_ampacity / calc.voltage_drop / calc.cpc_adiabatic deferred per WI3 — engineer estimates from BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 4 Tables 4D1A/4D2A/4E1A/4E2A serve as placeholder values pending deterministic resolution.

rationale.chat_summary: Kenya 415V TPN+E commercial office (60-200 m²), KPLC TN-S, Ze=0.45Ω, PSCC=9kA. 6-node cascade per KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 4 + App 12. MSB-1 95 mm² Cu XLPE; F01 lighting feeder 10 mm² (iz_vs_in); F02 power sub-feeder 25 mm² (vd_cumulative binding); F03 HVAC feeder 16 mm²; F02.C03 remote final 4 mm² (vd_cumulative); F03.C01 chiller pump 6 mm² motor-starting Vd 3.0%. 3 calc tools pending.

sections.title: Project Supply + Jurisdiction
sections.summary: KE jurisdiction; KS 1700:2018 is the primary code. KPLC TN-S 415V TPN+E supply with declared Ze=0.45Ω and PSCC=9.0 kA at MSB-1 busbar. KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §313.1 for the short-circuit verification rule, anchoring App 4 ampacity and App 12 Vd limits across the cascade.

decisions.label: TN-S earthing per KPLC declaration
decisions.summary: 415V TPN+E supply with separate PE conductor terminated at the MSB-1 incoming gland.

decisions.label: PSCC 9.0 kA declared at MSB-1
decisions.summary: Engineer accepts KPLC PSCC declaration as the parent_node_ifault_ka root for the cascade; downstream Ifault attenuated by cable impedance.

sections.title: Cascade Tree + Topology
sections.summary: Three-tier cascade: MSB-1 (service_entrance, 315A) feeds three DB feeders — F01 (DB-L1 lighting, 40A), F02 (DB-P1 small-power sub-feeder, 80A), F03 (DB-M1 HVAC, 63A). F02 and F03 each carry one representative final circuit (F02.C03 remote small-power; F03.C01 chiller pump 7.5 kW). 6 nodes total, node_id form 'MSB-1.Fxx.Cyy'.

decisions.label: Three-tier cascade with hierarchical node_ids
decisions.summary: service_entrance → feeder/sub_feeder → final_circuit; hierarchical node_id form enables downstream consumers (cable-schedule, riser) to render the tree.
decisions.rule: Cascade topology per cable-sizing IR spec; KS 1700:2018 §314 division of installation

sections.title: Walk-the-Ladder Approach + Binding Constraints
sections.summary: Engine walks the standard IEC ladder (1.0→1.5→2.5→4→6→10→16→25→35→50→70→95 mm²) until all checks pass simultaneously. Per KS 1700:2018 §433 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §433.1 (Iz ≥ In). Four nodes bind iz_vs_in (MSB-1, F01, F03, F03.C01); two bind vd_cumulative (F02 sub-feeder + F02.C03 remote final). F03.C01 also passes the motor-starting Vd check.

decisions.label: Iz_vs_in on MSB-1
decisions.summary: 315A OCPD on incoming MSB; 95 mm² Cu XLPE method E gives Iz_corrected ≈ 326 A; iz_vs_in passes at first sane ladder step.

decisions.label: vd_cumulative on F02 sub-feeder
decisions.summary: 80A sub-feeder at 35 m: 16 mm² (Iz 92 A pass) walks up to 25 mm² to drop segment Vd from 1.50% to 0.96% (post-H4 corrected denominator 415 V line-line per BS 7671 App 12), preserving cumulative headroom for the 45 m downstream final F02.C03.
decisions.rule: Voltage drop limit per KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 12 §G; engineering judgement to allocate cascade budget

decisions.label: vd_cumulative on F02.C03 remote final
decisions.summary: 20A single-phase final at 45 m downstream of F02; 2.5 mm² rejected (cumulative 5.27% > 5%), 4 mm² accepted at 4.47% cumulative.
decisions.rule: Cumulative Vd ≤ 5% for power circuits per KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 12 §G

sections.title: Cumulative Voltage Drop
sections.summary: Vd accumulates root → leaf along the cascade. App 12 §G limits: lighting 3% (≈12.5V at 415V), power 5% (≈20.75V at 415V). F02 walk-up to 25 mm² is engineering judgement: 16 mm² would pass at F02 alone (cumulative 1.81%) but push F02.C03 cumulative to 5.01% (just over 5% limit). By walking F02 up first, F02.C03 sits comfortably at 4.47% with the smallest finals csa. Post-H4: 3-phase denominators corrected to 415 V line-line per BS 7671 App 12.

decisions.label: Cascade Vd budget allocation
decisions.summary: Walk sub-feeder up at design time to preserve downstream final-circuit headroom; sizing engine treats Vd as a cumulative constraint along the cascade path.
decisions.rule: Vd cumulative accounting per KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 12 §G

sections.title: CPC Adiabatic Sizing
sections.summary: Per KS 1700:2018 §543 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 543.1.3 + Table 54.7. Phase ≤ 16 mm² → CPC = phase (conservative default). For ≥ 25 mm² phase (F02 25 mm² / MSB-1 95 mm²), reduced CPC verified by adiabatic S² ≥ I²t / k² (k=143 for Cu/XLPE per Table 54.3; t=0.4s from t_clear_s). CPC selections: 95/50, 10/10, 25/16, 16/16, 4/2.5, 6/6.

decisions.label: Reduced CPC on 95 mm² incoming and 25 mm² sub-feeder
decisions.summary: Adiabatic equation S² ≥ I²t/k² with t_clear_s 0.4s and k=143 gives S_min well below the simplified Table 54.7 figure; engineer adopts the reduced CPC per Table 54.3 + Reg 543.1.3.
decisions.rule: CPC adiabatic sizing per KS 1700:2018 §543 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 543.1.3

sections.title: Motor Starting + Parallel Cables + Harmonic Derating
sections.summary: F03.C01 (chiller pump 7.5 kW DOL, 3-phase) is the only motor. vd_running=0.46%; LRA=6.5 for IEC AB; vd_starting=3.0%, within the 10% limit per KS 1700:2018 §552 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 552.1.1 + IEC 60034-12 (post-H4 corrected to ÷415). parallel_count=1 throughout — 95 mm² Cu XLPE incoming handles 250A Ib in single run. No high-harmonic loads declared; harmonic_ch_applied omitted.

decisions.label: Motor-starting Vd on F03.C01
decisions.summary: DOL starter with locked-rotor current 6.5× FLA gives vd_starting 3.0% — within the 10% limit; engineer accepts without contactor-soft-start.
decisions.rule: Motor starting Vd ≤ 10% per KS 1700:2018 §552 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Reg 552.1.1; LRA factor per IEC 60034-12 design code AB

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions + Tool-Call Pending
sections.summary: compliant=true. Three info-severity flags document binding-constraint walk-ups (F02 sub-feeder + F02.C03 final + F03.C01 motor-starting). Assumptions capture KPLC supply declaration, cascade Vd budget allocation, motor LRA factor, CPC adiabatic basis, XLPE-feeders/PVC-finals design intent, and WI3 calc deferrals.

decisions.label: Three deferred-calc flags
decisions.summary: calc.cable_ampacity, calc.voltage_drop, calc.cpc_adiabatic all carry TOOL-CALL-PENDING flags per WI3 — engineer placeholders ratified at runtime.
decisions.rule: WI3 deferred-calc contract; engineer estimates carry tool_call_pending=true
decisions.code_clause: KS 1700:2018 §313 routes to BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 App 4 (ampacity) + App 12 (Vd) + Reg 543.1.3 (CPC)

sections.title: Cross-Skill Contract
sections.summary: Emits cable-sizing intent with 6 circuit records covering the full hierarchical cascade (MSB-1.Fxx.Cyy node_ids). Required-field set is the union superset of 4 downstream consumers: cable-schedule (tabulated deliverable), riser (parent-child render), cable-containment (tray/conduit fill), small-power v1.1 (Zs resolution via r1+r2 and reactance per metre at operating temp).

decisions.label: Forward-compatible intent emission
decisions.summary: Required-field set is the union superset of cable-schedule + riser + cable-containment + small-power v1.1 consumers; optional fields (cable_od_mm, weight_kg_per_m) included for downstream containment fill calc.
